column1: # Writes the count of Values <= bin[i] AND > bin[i-1] into the cell
# immediately right of each bin cell, plus one extra row at the
# bottom of the bin-column-plus-one for the "above the largest bin"
# Bin-range POINT — pointer is parked at the values top-left (A1)
# with no anchor (Copy-style "navigate to destination" semantics).
# Walk to B1, anchor with `.`, extend to B4, commit.
